category_sources: Official Great Scott Gadgets GitHub README says libbtbb is a Bluetooth baseband decoding library.
source_facts.description says Bluetooth baseband decoding library.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository is named greatscottgadgets/libbtbb and README heading is libbtbb.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README documents libbtbb build instructions.
Official Ubertooth documentation from Great Scott Gadgets documents building libbtbb from git as part of the Ubertooth toolchain.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/greatscottgadgets/libbtbb, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official README says it extracts Bluetooth packet and piconet information from Ubertooth devices and GR-Bluetooth/USRP.
